how: These activity cards are automatically generated based on activity in my memory system. I review them every few days, and they automatically publish here.
closer: A live working surface, not a portfolio.

items.title: Stood up the design foundation for a rate-comparison site
items.body: Built and deployed the token kit for a home-loan rate comparison site, a componentised shadcn front end so it hands over to the client's dev team ready to wire up to live data. Anchored colour, type and spacing as reusable tokens and pulled a deep teal base toward a more authoritative tone, so the pages read sharp and trustworthy rather than poppy.

items.title: Built an internal company hub wired to our design system
items.body: Stood up a private internal site that consumes our design system at the component level, so a change to the system flows straight through to the live pages instead of being copied across by hand. Got the propagation test passing, then created the repo and pushed it ready to deploy.

items.title: Token-bound component work in a fintech design system
items.body: Redesigned a key-points module in a client's Figma library, keeping every colour, type and spacing value bound to the design tokens rather than hand-set. Pushed the eyebrow style down into the component set so the rule lives in one place, and switched the cards to hug-and-stretch so longer copy stops clipping.

items.title: Designed a privacy dial for a newsletter product
items.body: Designed an interactive privacy control for a community newsletter product, a dial that sets each story to Owned, Open or Public with the active state lit in its own zone colour. Built it click-to-select with the labels pinned to the arc, so the privacy posture reads at a glance instead of hiding in a settings menu.

items.title: Rebuilt our founder Slack bot as a native service
items.body: Converted the founder bot from a scheduled poller into an event-driven macOS service, so it answers in our founder Slack the moment it's addressed by name and follows up in-thread. Packaged it so each founder installs their own with one command, each bot running off its own vault and signing every reply as a proxy rather than the person.

items.title: Built a Slack harvester for our founder channel
items.body: Built a harvester that reads everything posted in our founder Slack and sorts it as it lands. Insights, ideas and calls to action drop into a triage list, and any links, tools or gear get catalogued in a separate resource library so they stay referenceable.

items.title: Wrote a ticket-builder skill while standing up a Linear epic
items.body: Stood up a social media epic in our Linear workspace, eight sub-issues wired with the right blocked-by sequencing, and captured the method as a reusable ticket-builder skill so the next epic starts from a real template. The rule baked in is to find the actual vault source before writing a ticket and link it while writing, so the tickets stay grounded and reference-able.

items.title: Designed packaging for an endurance nutrition brand
items.body: Designed screen proofs for a single-serve sachet and a four-pack pouch, building each face to the exact dieline so the front reads at thumbnail size and the back-of-pack info stays legible. Most of the work was the compliance copy, splitting the in-exercise usage rate from the daily limit so the two don't contradict each other on a sports food label.
